name: Q7966115
description: American recording engineer, musician, instrument importer and designer, inventor, composer and film producer (1930–2010)
abstract: Walter Edmond Sear (27 April 1930 – 29 April 2010) was an American recording engineer, musician, instrument importer and designer, inventor, composer and film producer. He was considered a pioneer in the use of the synthesizer and an expert on vintage recording equipment.

about_quotes.speaker: Dick Hyman
about_quotes.evidence: I was working with Walter Carlos, not Walter Carlos, Walter Sear... And we were able to work out various things that created, I guess, it was the first pop synthesizer record.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dick Hyman interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, March 4, 1995 [interview 1 of 2]
